name: AParadise II Acquisition Corp.
business: AParadise II Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target. It intends to concentrate efforts on companies in the leisure and entertainment sectors but is not required to do so.
